settings.identifier_help: Used to generate a unique avatar for each user.
settings.driver_not_active_warning: Boring Avatars is not the active avatar driver.
settings.driver_not_active_warning_link: Go to Basic Settings to activate it.
settings.theme_help: The theme to use for the boring avatars.

boringavatar.export_description: Adds the boring avatar to the export zip.
boringavatar.anonymize_description: Deletes the boring avatar, and regenerates a new random one.
